title: Box64 Configurator
select_entry: Select an entry on the left.
unsupported_help: These keys are preserved when a system entry is forked, but this tool does not edit them.
system_note: This entry comes from the system rcfile. Fork it to edit it in the user rcfile.
user_note: This entry is stored in the user rcfile.
forked: Created a user fork; save writes it to the user rcfile.
new_drop_hint: You can also drag and drop an executable onto the window to create an emtry entry.
new_global_hint: Use * to create a global entry.
delete_body: Only the user rcfile section will be removed. The system rcfile is not changed.
save_changes_body: Your user rcfile edits have not been saved.
